extension.summary: Run CECActivateSource so Kodi takes the TV (its own HDMI input).
extension.description: A one-shot helper for the CEC Control Experiment desktop switcher. When launched (e.g. via JSON-RPC Addons.ExecuteAddon from the CEC Switcher app), it runs the CECActivateSource builtin so the Kodi box re-asserts its OWN active source and the TV switches to Kodi's HDMI input. Legitimate CEC -- Kodi announces only its own source; no injection or spoofing.
